entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:35
entries.excerpt: Second, perversity of a judge is excluded: "To turn aside the right of a man in the presence of the Most High." That is, from rectitude. Add to Verse 36: "the Lord does not approve." And, Job 34:12: "Of a truth, God will not do wickedly, and the Almighty will not pervert justice."
